summary: All tests PASSED for Tenant Screening with Credits System and Rent Payments features. Backend API tests all passed (10/10). Frontend UI tests all passed - pages load correctly, dialogs open properly, and plan-gating works as expected.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/screening/credits returns credit balance structure (balance, purchased, plan_included)
Backend: POST /api/screening/purchase-credits rejects invalid package with 400
Backend: POST /api/screening/purchase-credits accepts valid package (demo mode adds credits directly)
Backend: GET /api/screening/requests returns screening requests array
Backend: GET /api/rent-payments returns payments array with month/year filtering
Backend: GET /api/rent-payments/summary returns summary stats (total_expected, total_collected, outstanding, collection_rate)
Backend: POST /api/rent-payments/generate-monthly creates payment records for active tenants
Backend: GET /api/rent-payments with status filter works for pending/paid/overdue
Backend: GET /api/billing/subscription-status returns plan info
Backend: GET /api/organizations/{org_id}/tenants returns tenants list
Frontend: Screening page loads with data-testid='screening-page'
Frontend: Screening page displays credit balance (currently showing 1 credit)
Frontend: Screening page shows upgrade notice for Free plan users ('Standard or Pro plan required')
Frontend: Buy Credits dialog opens with 4 packages ($39, $175, $320, $725)
Frontend: Buy Credits dialog shows 'Best Value' badge on 10 Screenings pack
Frontend: New Screening button disabled for Free plan (plan-gated correctly)
Frontend: Rent Payments page loads with data-testid='rent-payments-page'
Frontend: Rent Payments shows Expected, Collected, Outstanding, Collection Rate summary cards
Frontend: Rent Payments has month and year filter dropdowns
Frontend: Add Payment dialog opens with tenant selection, unit selection, amount field, due date field
Frontend: Generate Monthly dialog opens with correct description about active tenants
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and organization

mocked_apis.screening_results: Screening results are MOCKED/simulated - not connected to real TransUnion/RentPrep API
mocked_apis.stripe_checkout: Stripe checkout in demo mode when no API key configured - credits added directly without payment

context_for_next_testing_agent: Tenant Screening with credits system and Rent Payments tracking fully implemented. Screening is plan-gated (requires Standard or Pro plan). Credits can be purchased in 4 packages: $39 (1), $175 (5), $320 (10 - Best Value), $725 (25). Credits are deducted per screening. Rent Payments has month/year filtering, summary cards, and ability to generate monthly payments for all active tenants. Both features working correctly with proper plan validation.
